description:
You are a personal financial advisor managing a client's equity portfolio. After strong technology sector gains in late 2023, the portfolio has become severely overweight in tech stocks (approximately 78% allocation versus the client's Investment Policy Statement target of 45% tech / 30% healthcare / 25% energy). Rebalance the portfolio by recording the following transactions dated February 15, 2024, with a $6.95 broker fee for each. Export the sell portfolio to /home/ga/Desktop/rebalance_sells_feb2024.csv.

SELL transactions:
- 45 shares of AAPL at $184.15
- 12 shares of NVDA at $674.72

BUY transactions:
- 35 shares of JNJ at $159.54
- 55 shares of XOM at $103.87

Current holdings:
- AAPL: 150 shares (purchased Jan 2, 2024 @ $185.64)
- MSFT: 80 shares (purchased Jan 2, 2024 @ $374.51)
- NVDA: 35 shares (purchased Jan 2, 2024 @ $495.22)
- JNJ: 40 shares (purchased Jan 2, 2024 @ $152.10)
- XOM: 60 shares (purchased Jan 2, 2024 @ $99.64)
